top_signals.title: Oil prices fall after Trump delays planned Iran strike, easing supply disruption fears
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell after U.S. President Donald Trump said he would postpone a planned military strike on Iran following requests from key Middle Eastern leaders.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Putin Aims to Unlock Gas Pipeline in Xi Talks
top_signals.summary: Vladimir Putin is set to travel to Beijing for talks with President Xi Jinping, with the war in Iran offering an opportunity for Russia to deepen energy links with China. Bloomberg's Stephen Engle reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Putin aims to unlock gas pipeline project to China in Xi talks
top_signals.summary: Russia hopes the turmoil in energy markets from the Middle East conflict will make China more flexible in contract negotiations for gas prices for a planned pipeline project.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
